## Tags
tree, forest, park, nature

## Categories
nature, sustainability

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/trees)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Trees;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Trees { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
